result.headline: Tarot reads 000001.SS as unfavorable
result.subline: Five of Swords colors the reading; market pulse remains mixed.
result.short_reading: The mock tarot reading intentionally mixes market pulse with engine-specific artifact signals for frontend contrast.
result.long_reading: This deterministic mock is not a forecast. It is designed to make cards diverge visually while preserving the same schema as real LLM output.
